images.caption: Anubhav CMC team at the planning table before the camp — flow, screening order, bed assignments.
Donor giving a thumbs-up halfway through the pull.
Registration desk at the front — donor cards being filled out as the queue builds.
Post-donation rest with juice and a quiet sit-back.
Quick anemia + obesity screen on the SamaBeat clip — passes the donor through to the bed if cleared.
Friends turned up together — one donating, one cheering from the next bed.
Phlebotomist prepping the arm — antiseptic wipe, vein found.
Volunteer settling in for the draw, team checking tube clamp and flow.
Donor finishing screening — sugar normal, hemoglobin cleared, on to the bed.
Bedside body-composition check while the donor waits — fat mass, muscle mass, hydration on one tap.
Cardiometabolic snapshot at intake — every donor gets numbers they can take home.
Team huddle before doors open — bed count, screening flow, who is at which station.
End of the bag — clamp going on, gauze ready, donor about to sit up.
Friends turned up together — one donating, one cheering from the next bed.
